$comment: Single source of truth for the build-time backlog. Exactly one feature may be `in_progress` at a time — enforced by `.claude/init.sh`. Status: queued | in_progress | done. Add new features at the bottom; do not renumber.

features.title: Project scaffold
features.summary: Repo skeleton: settings, Docker, Postgres, custom User, owner-scoped manager, empty apps, .claude/ harness, docs.

features.title: Exercise catalogue (seed + custom)
features.summary: Land MuscleGroup, Equipment, Exercise (with nullable owner), ExerciseAlternative. Data migration loads seeds/exercises.yaml. Admin CRUD.

features.title: Routines + WeeklySplit
features.summary: Routine, RoutineDay, RoutineExercise, WeeklySplit. Owner-scoped. Admin + minimal user-facing list/create.

features.title: Workout session with interactive set checklist
features.summary: WorkoutSession, ExerciseLog, SetLog with completed_at. HTMX tap-to-complete checklist; Alpine.js rest timer.

features.title: PR auto-detection + manual override
features.summary: PersonalRecord model; signal/service that updates PRs when a SetLog is completed; PR list + edit views.

features.title: Body metric snapshots
features.summary: UserMetricSnapshot model + admin + simple chart/list. Profile edit form for height & DOB.

features.title: Dashboard: today / week / history / PR highlights
features.summary: Replace the Phase 0 placeholder with real cards driven by routines + sessions + PRs.

features.title: Session live editing (add exercise/set on the fly + custom exercise)
features.summary: During an in-progress workout: pick or add a custom exercise mid-session, add another set to any exercise, delete sets/exercises. HTMX endpoints.

features.title: User-facing routine CRUD
features.summary: List/create/edit/delete routines + days + exercises in the UI, not just /admin/.

features.title: Routine generator from split + muscle groups
features.summary: Pick a split preset (PPL, Upper/Lower, Bro Split, Full Body) or a custom muscle-group plan; service generates RoutineDays + exercises balancing compound/isolation per training_style.

features.title: Progression service (linear + double progression)
features.summary: DeterministicLinearProgression (powerlifting) and DeterministicDoubleProgression (bodybuilding/powerbuilding). recommend_next() wired into start_session so every working set is pre-filled with weight×reps from the last completed session.

features.title: Substitution service multi-factor scoring
features.summary: Deterministic scorer ranks alternatives by primary/secondary muscle overlap (Jaccard), curated-graph bonus, equipment match/availability, and category. `ranked_alternatives()` powers a 'Cambiar' swap UI on the session exercise card (refuses once a set is completed).

features.title: Warm-up set generation
features.summary: Deterministic warmup_scheme (services/warmup): 40/60/80% ramp of the working weight, snapped to loadable weights per equipment (barbell/smith 5 kg @ 20 kg bar, ez-bar 5 kg @ 10 kg, else 2.5 kg), never >= working. Auto-generated on session start for barbell/smith lifts with a known weight; per-exercise 'Calentamiento' button for the rest (idempotent regen). Warm-ups excluded from progress + PRs.

features.title: Monthly goals
features.summary: MonthlyGoal model (per user+month, nullable session/volume/bodyweight targets). gymapp.services.goals.monthly_goal_progress computes progress from finished sessions, completed working sets (excludes warm-ups), and bodyweight snapshots (baseline-relative, direction-aware). Editor at metrics:goals (upserts current month); progress card on the dashboard + nav 'Metas' link.

features.title: Daily calorie + macro targets (BMR/TDEE/macros)
features.summary: users.Profile gains sex + activity_level. gymapp.services.nutrition: Mifflin-St Jeor BMR, TDEE via ACTIVITY_FACTORS, goal calorie multiplier (cut 0.80 / bulk+hypertrophy 1.10 / strength 1.05 / recomp+maintain 1.00), macro split (protein 2.0 g/kg, 2.2 on cut; fat 0.8 g/kg; carbs fill, clamped at 0). daily_target_for_user(user) -> (MacroTarget|None, missing_fields). New gymapp.apps.nutrition app + /nutrition/ page shows today's kcal+macros or a complete-profile prompt; nav 'Nutrición' link; profile editor extended.

features.title: Food + vegetable preferences
features.summary: Profile.food_preferences JSONField (list of slugs from services.nutrition.FOOD_CATALOG: protein/carb/vegetable/fat, English slug + Spanish label). Editor at nutrition:preferences (grouped checkboxes; POST keeps only known slugs via clean_food_preferences). Count shown on the nutrition page. Migration users.0003.

features.title: Basic meal slot scaffolding
features.summary: services.nutrition.build_meal_plan(target, preferences) splits the daily MacroTarget across 4 slots (MEAL_SLOTS: breakfast 25% / lunch 35% / dinner 30% / snack 10%) and suggests foods per slot from the user's preferences (SLOT_COMPONENTS categories, rotated by slot index). Rendered on the Nutrition page below the macros. Closes the Phase 3 exit criterion.

features.title: Analytics service + Progreso page (volume rollups)
features.summary: services.analytics: weekly_volume(user, weeks) (tonnage + working-set count per Monday-anchored week, zero-filled) and sets_by_muscle(user) (this week's hard sets + volume per primary muscle group, full counting; warm-ups/incomplete excluded). dashboard:progress (/progreso/) renders an 8-week tonnage trend + sets-per-muscle bars; nav 'Progreso' link.

features.title: Deload suggestions
features.summary: services.analytics.deload_recommendation(user): counts the trailing run of consecutive completed training weeks (ignores the partial current week), stopping at any week whose tonnage <= 60% of the run median (already a deload). Recommends a deload at ACCUMULATION_WEEKS (5). Amber card on /progreso/ (always shows accumulating count) + a conditional alert on the dashboard home when recommended.

features.title: Nutrition: bigger catalog + generate/save/eat meals
features.summary: Expanded FOOD_CATALOG (whey concentrate/isolate, casein, salmon, seitan, edamame, soy/pea protein, brown rice, banana, chia, etc.). services.nutrition.generate_meal samples a varied meal from preferences for a slot. nutrition.SavedMeal model (slot, foods, macro snapshot, eaten_at) + views: generate (nutrition:generate_meal), toggle eaten with timestamp (nutrition:meal_done), delete (nutrition:meal_delete). 'Mis comidas' list + 'Generar comida' control on the nutrition page.

features.title: 6-week block programming
features.summary: routines.TrainingBlock model (owner, training_style, started_on, length_weeks; migration routines.0003). services.coaching.blocks holds deterministic 6-week templates per style (bodybuilding/powerlifting/powerbuilding, week 6 = deload); block_status derives the current week from started_on vs today (no jobs). routines:block (/routines/bloque/) shows the full plan with the current week highlighted + starts a new block; dashboard 'Tu bloque' card shows the current week. Closes Phase 5.
